fields.name: runtime.adapter_id
fields.description: Runtime adapter identifier used for generated-files planning.

fields.name: runtime.mode
fields.description: Selected adapter mode, such as generated-files or legacy-manifest.

fields.name: runtime.plugin_beta_enabled
fields.description: Whether an opt-in plugin beta path was selected by the renderer.

fields.name: runtime.generated_file_count
fields.description: Count of files planned or emitted for the selected runtime.

fields.name: runtime.adapter_contract_version
fields.description: Adapter contract version that informed generated-files planning.
